tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Configure access types, reserve free places and reconcile the immutable ticket ledger.
tickets.empty: No ticket types have been configured for this event.
tickets.reconciliation_clear: Ticket inventory and ledger records reconcile.
tickets.reconciliation_error: Ticket reconciliation could not be completed.
tickets.gateway_notice: Time-credit ticket types can be drafted, but they cannot be activated or charged until the approved wallet gateway is connected.
tickets.not_purchasable: This ticket type cannot currently be reserved.
tickets.time_credit_cancel_disabled: Time-credit ticket cancellation is unavailable in this free-only flow. No wallet action has been taken.
tickets.allocate_error: The ticket could not be reserved.
tickets.cancel_error: The ticket could not be cancelled.
tickets.action_error: The ticket type could not be updated.
tickets.validation_error: Review the ticket details and correct the highlighted values.
tickets.save_error: The ticket type could not be saved.
tickets.name: Name
tickets.group_ids_hint: Optional comma-separated group IDs. Only eligible members of every listed group can reserve this type.
tickets.time_credit_draft_warning: This type will remain a non-purchasable draft until the time-credit payment gateway is approved and connected.
